title: Finalize Studio run service and persisted artifact contracts
success_criteria: Studio can launch a real run and persist manifests, stage status, metrics, outliers, and artifacts
Run APIs support launch, list, load, artifact inspection, log inspection, and compare
Backend exposes honest runnable vs blocked adapter status

title: Complete six-workspace web shell for live runs and dataset controls
success_criteria: User can edit, validate, compile, launch, and inspect runs from the UI
Execution Console surfaces stage status, artifacts, logs, and adapter truth
Analysis workspace shows metrics, outliers, and run comparison

title: Replace synthetic Studio backlog with curated next-wave queue
success_criteria: Orchestrator points at curated real-file queue
Program status reports curated queue size
No synthetic file targets remain in the active execution lane

title: Add Studio execution guide and runnable-vs-adapter module matrix
success_criteria: Guide documents the executable PPI vertical slice
Module matrix clearly marks runnable, adapter-backed, and blocked capabilities
Architecture review calls out follow-on refactor targets

title: Add Studio smoke tests, user-sim review, and visual QA notes
success_criteria: Runtime launch path is covered by tests
User-sim review documents the leakage-resistant PPI flow and resulting friction
Visual review covers the six workspace shell

title: Start follow-on adapter wave for PyRosetta and AlphaFold truthful blocking
success_criteria: Follow-on backlog identifies real adapter and environment blockers
Program preview stays aligned with the executable v1 truth model
